basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Science Communication and Policy Research (CSIR NIScPR)
basic_details.post_name: Project Staff (PAT-I, PAT-II, Project Assistant, Project Scientist, Senior PAT)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for all posts. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's/Integrated Masters, Bachelor's degree in Engineering/Technology/Medicine, Doctoral Degree in Science, SSC/10th plus ITI
qualification.details: PAT-I: Bachelor's degree in Engineering/Technology (B.E/B.Tech) or Master's degree (M.Sc./MCA)/Integrated Masters in Computer Science, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Environmental Science or related disciplines. OR Masters/Integrated Masters in Natural or Agricultural or Pharmaceutical Sciences/MVSc/Animal Sciences or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine. PAT-II: Master's degree/Integrated Masters in Environmental Science, Atmospheric Science, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science or allied disciplines with minimum 2 years experience in environmental data analysis/AQI modelling/time series modelling OR Masters/Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology. OR Masters/Integrated Masters in Natural Sciences (Preferably Environmental Science/Physics/Chemistry) or BE/B.Tech (Preferably Chemical/Mechanical/Environmental Engineering) with 2 years experience in R&D OR Masters/Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology. OR Master/Integrated Masters in Natural or Agricultural or Pharmaceutical Sciences/MVSc/Animal Sciences/M Pharm or BE/B.Tech (Preferably Chemical/Mechanical/Environmental Engineering) with 2 years R&D experience OR Masters/Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology. OR Masters/Integrated Masters in Natural or Agricultural or Pharmaceutical Sciences/MVSc/Animal Sciences OR Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine with 2 years R&D experience OR Masters/Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology (Biomedical/Biotechnology/Data Science/Biological Engineering). OR Masters/Integrated Masters in Natural or Agricultural or Pharmaceutical Sciences/MVSc/Animal Sciences or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine with 2 years R&D experience OR Masters/Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology. Project Assistant - I: SSC/10th plus ITI. Project Scientist II: Doctoral Degree in Science or Master's/Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology (Biomedical Engineering/Biotechnology/Data Science/Biological Engineering/Biological Science/Bioengineering) with 5 years R&D experience. Senior PAT: Masters/Integrated Masters in Natural or Agricultural or Pharmaceutical Sciences/MVSc/Animal Sciences or Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology or Medicine with 3 years R&D experience OR Masters/Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology OR Doctoral Degree in Science/Pharma/MD/MS with 2 years R&D experience.

all_official_links.label: Download CSIR NIScPR Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by CSIR NIScPR?
faq.answer: CSIR NIScPR has announced a total of 15 vacancies for Project Staff positions, including PAT-I, PAT-II, Project Assistant, Project Scientist, and Senior PAT.

faq.question: Q2. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

faq.question: Q3. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 30th June 2026. Candidates are advised to report at the venue between 09:00 AM and 11:00 AM.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for the posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant - I post?
faq.answer: For the Project Assistant - I post, candidates must have completed SSC/10th standard along with an ITI certification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Scientist II position?
faq.answer: The Project Scientist II position offers a salary of Rs. 67,000/- plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fees for the CSIR NIScPR recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on Academic Records, a Test, and an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be conducted at the National Institute of Science Communication and Policy Research (CSIR NIScPR) located in New Delhi, 110012.
